$comment: Copy to synthelion.config.json (or set SYNTHELION_CONFIG to point elsewhere) and edit. Every key has a built-in default (see synthelion/config.py) — a partial file only needs to override what changes. This example shows the docker-compose 'cluster' profile: Redis for sessions, Qdrant for RAG vectors, dashboard listening on all interfaces for a load-balanced/Kubernetes deployment.
